name: White Chocolate Cashew Pie
recipeInstructions:
Crust: In a medium mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, and baking powder. Cut the chilled butter into 46 cubes and toss with the flour. Add shortening and mix until the dough forms small lumps. Gradually add ice water, stirring until the dough is moist and cohesive. Form into a ball, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate for several hours.
Once firm, roll out on a floured surface to form a 12-inch round pie shell. Press into a 9-inch pie tin, trimming excess dough evenly. Refrigerate until ready.
Filling: Whisk butter, sugar, and eggs separately. Gradually add remaining ingredients. Pour filling into the prepared crust. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour. Serve with whipped cream or ice cream.
